name: live_price
description: Live Price Oracle — Multi-source price feed (CoinGecko + Yahoo Finance) for 10,000+ assets: crypto, stocks, commodities, forex. Returns: current price + 24h/7d/30d % + market cap + volume + supply. Cross-validates feeds, fallback on primary failure. For: trading bots, arbitrage, portfolio trackers (NAV), DCA, swap routers, liquidation hunters, MEV, market makers, lending (LTV). Discovery tier for high-volume agents. <100ms ($0.01). Keywords: oracle, price feed, real-time, NAV.
deliverable: "JSON: { symbol, priceUsd, change24h, change7d, marketCap, volume24h, source, timestamp }"
